settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Handcrafted orders typically ship within 5-7 business days. Delivery takes an additional 3-5 days depending on your location. We ship across India and internationally.

settings.question: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer free shipping on all orders above Rs. 1,499 within India.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Absolutely. You'll receive a tracking link via email and WhatsApp once your order ships.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes, we ship to over 30 countries worldwide. International delivery takes 7-14 business days. Customs duties may apply based on your country.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer 15-day easy returns on all non-sale items. Items must be unused, unwashed, and in their original packaging with tags attached.

settings.question: How do I initiate a return?
settings.answer: Simply WhatsApp us or email hello@acharkhastory.com with your order number. We'll arrange a pickup at no extra cost within India.

settings.question: Can I exchange for a different size or colour?
settings.answer: Yes! Exchanges are free. Contact us within 15 days of delivery and we'll arrange the swap.

settings.question: How should I care for handwoven fabrics?
settings.answer: Hand wash gently in cold water with mild detergent. Do not wring or twist — lay flat to dry in shade. Iron on low heat. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

settings.question: Are your products truly handmade?
settings.answer: Yes, 100%. Every product is handcrafted by artisan families across India. No machines are used in the making of our textiles. Each piece may have minor variations — this is a sign of authenticity, not a defect.

settings.question: Will handwoven fabrics shrink?
settings.answer: Natural fabrics may shrink 2-3% after the first wash. This is normal for handwoven textiles. We recommend cold water hand washing to minimise shrinkage.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, and popular wallets including Paytm and PhonePe via Razorpay. International customers can pay via credit card.

settings.question: Is COD available?
settings.answer: Cash on Delivery is available for orders within India under Rs. 5,000. A nominal COD fee of Rs. 49 applies.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subtitle: Everything you need to know about shopping with A Charkha Story.
settings.contact_text: Reach out to us at hello@acharkhastory.com or WhatsApp us at +91-99999-99999. We reply within 24 hours.
